name: whetstone
description: Whetstone — remember what you read, watch, and listen to. One plugin: the /whetstone spaced-retrieval skill over plain markdown files you own.

plugins.name: whetstone
plugins.description: Spaced-retrieval understanding system over plain markdown — /whetstone ingests what you consume, quizzes you with a fresh question each time, and reviews it all on an expanding schedule.
